name: wdp-webpack-poc
description: Micro-frontend PoC: Angular 20 shell + disputes-mfe via Webpack Module Federation

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix wdp-app/mock-api && npm install --prefix wdp-app/disputes-mfe --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix wdp-app/wdp-shell --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix enterprise-app --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix enterprise-react-app
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:api" "npm run start:mfe" "npm run start:shell" "npm run start:enterprise" "npm run start:react"
